title: calliphyllon latifolium
intro: Calliphyllon latifolium, also known as the large-leaved Calliphyllo or Ceylon tea tree, is a plant species in the family Melastomataceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The plant's leaves have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, headache, and digestive issues, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The leaves of Calliphyllon latifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural health solutions.
